summary: Testing completed for CRM Alpha Agency P0 and P1 features. All 12 backend tests passed (100%). Frontend UI testing verified: PDF download works (toast 'PDF téléchargé !'), Settings modal opens with all company fields (company_name, company_address, company_siret, company_vat), Bulk selection shows '2 sélectionné(s)' bar with Télécharger and Supprimer buttons, Email API returns success.
critical_code_review_comments: PDF generation with long descriptions now works without LayoutError - descriptions can span multiple pages
Settings modal includes all company fields: company_name, company_address, company_siret, company_vat
Settings are persisted to MongoDB and used in PDF generation
Bulk delete uses confirmation dialog and handles errors gracefully
Email sending with PDF attachment works via Brevo API

success_rate.frontend: 100% (PDF download, Settings modal, Bulk selection all working)

seed_data_creation: Created test invoices/devis during testing for PDF and bulk delete verification
context_for_next_testing_agent: All P0 and P1 features are working: 1) PDF download returns HTTP 200 with valid PDF file (no 500 error), 2) PDF with long descriptions works without LayoutError, 3) Email API returns success with PDF attachment, 4) Bulk selection shows toolbar with Télécharger and Supprimer buttons, 5) Settings modal opens with company_name, company_address, company_siret, company_vat fields, 6) Settings are persisted and used in PDF generation.

p0_pdf_download_facture.details: GET /api/invoices/{id}/pdf returns HTTP 200 with valid PDF file, toast shows 'PDF téléchargé !'

p0_pdf_download_devis.details: GET /api/invoices/{id}/pdf for devis returns HTTP 200 with valid PDF

p0_pdf_long_description.details: PDF generation with very long descriptions works without LayoutError

p0_email_with_pdf.details: POST /api/invoices/{id}/send-email returns success with PDF attachment

p1_bulk_delete_button.details: Supprimer button visible in bulk selection toolbar

p1_settings_modal_opens.details: Settings button (gear icon) opens 'Paramètres de facturation' modal

p1_settings_company_name.details: company_name field present and editable in settings modal

p1_settings_company_address.details: company_address field present and editable in settings modal

p1_settings_company_siret.details: company_siret field present and editable in settings modal

p1_settings_company_vat.details: company_vat field present and editable in settings modal

p1_settings_persistence.details: Settings are persisted to MongoDB via PUT /api/settings/invoice

invoice_creation.details: New invoice form opens with client selector and items section

mocked_features.note: All APIs are real implementations. PDF generation uses ReportLab, Email uses Brevo API, Settings stored in MongoDB.
